_comment: Live .mcp.json shipping the LSP-backed serena recommendation per charter MVP item 6. Serena requires uvx; install via 'pip install uv' or 'brew install uv'. The git+https ref MUST be pinned to a known-good commit SHA before activating (replace <PIN-TO-COMMIT-SHA>). Failure to pin will make the uvx command error out — that is intentional fail-closed behavior.
_security_note: git+https without a pinned ref allows upstream takeover to execute arbitrary code via uvx. See documentation/mcp-lsp-setup.html for the pin-and-verify workflow.

_mcpServers_alt._comment: Alternative LSP-backed semantic-retrieval MCP. claude-context complements serena: serena does LSP symbolic nav (Go-to-Def, Find-References); claude-context does AST-chunked semantic RAG. Move into 'mcpServers' (and add credentials per its docs) to enable.
